name: Granting You a Dreamlike Life
overview: A French-Chinese food critic returns to her family home and finds an old diary that chronicles a grand love story between a popular actress and the son of a triad leader in 1920s Shanghai.

trailers.title: GRANTING YOU A DREAMLIKE LIFE - OFFICIAL TRAILER | An Yue Xi, Zhu Yi Long, Alen Fang, Kevin Chu
